zh.lifeSummary: 當John D. Hancock於1732年1月1日出生在美國維吉尼亞州福盧瓦納帕爾米拉時，他的父親Benjamin Franklin Hancock22歲，母親Elizabeth Jameson22歲。他於1755年10月15日與Elizabeth Maddox在美國維吉尼亞州古倫德聖 加也斯 帕里什結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1775年住在美國且於1785年住在美國維吉尼亞州亨利。他去世於1802年11月10日在美國維吉尼亞州古倫德享年70歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州帕特里克帕特里克 斯普林斯利波迪 普利米迪福 巴普蒂斯特 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John D. Hancock于1732年1月1日出生在美国弗吉尼亚州福盧瓦納帕爾米拉时，他的父亲Benjamin Franklin Hancock22岁，母亲Elizabeth Jameson22岁。他于1755年10月15日与Elizabeth Maddox在美国弗吉尼亚州古倫德聖 加也斯 帕里什结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1775年住在美国且于1785年住在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利。他去世于1802年11月10日在美国弗吉尼亚州古倫德享年70岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州帕特里克帕特里克 斯普林斯利波迪 普利米迪福 巴普蒂斯特 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."

historicEvents.title: Richmond Becomes the Capital
historicEvents.description: On April 18, 1780 Richmond became the capital of Virginia. It was the temporary capital from 1780-1788.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History- History of Richmond Virginia

historicEvents.title: The Making of the U.S. Constitution.
historicEvents.description: The Philadelphia Convention was intended to be the first meeting to establish the first system of government under the Articles of Confederation. From this Convention, the Constitution of the United States was made and then put into place making it one of the major events in all American History.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 10th state
historicEvents.description: On June 25, 1788 Virginia became the 10th state.

en.lifeSummary: When John D. Hancock was born on 1 January 1732, in Palmyra, Fluvanna, Virginia, United States, his father, Benjamin Franklin Hancock, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Jameson, was 22. He married Elizabeth Maddox on 15 October 1755, in St. Jame's Parish, Goochland, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. He lived in United States in 1775 and Henry, Virginia, United States in 1785. He died on 10 November 1802, in Goochland, Virginia, United States, at the age of 70, and was buried in Liberty Primitive Baptist Church Cemetery, Patrick Springs, Patrick, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John D. Hancock est né le 1 janvier 1732, à Palmyra, Fluvanna, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Benjamin Franklin Hancock, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Jameson, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Maddox le 15 octobre 1755, à St. Jame's Parish, Goochland, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Il a vécu à États-Unis en 1775 et à Henry, Virginie, États-Unis en 1785. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1802, à Goochland, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Liberty Primitive Baptist Church Cemetery, Patrick Springs, Patrick, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John D. Hancock am 1. Januar 1732 in Palmyra, Fluvanna, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benjamin Franklin Hancock 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Jameson 22. Er hat am 15. Oktober 1755 in St. Jame's Parish, Goochland, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth Maddox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1775 hat er in Vereinigte Staaten und 1785 in Henry, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 10. November 1802 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Goochland, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Liberty Primitive Baptist Church Cemetery, Patrick Springs, Patrick, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John D. Hancock è nato il il 1 gennaio 1732 nel Palmyra, Fluvanna, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Benjamin Franklin Hancock, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Jameson, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Maddox il 15 ottobre 1755, nel St. Jame's Parish, Goochland, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Vissuto a Stati Uniti d'America nel 1775 e nel Henry, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1785. Morì il 10 novembre 1802, nel Goochland, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Liberty Primitive Baptist Church Cemetery, Patrick Springs, Patrick, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John D. Hancockが1732年1月1日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州フルヴァナプアルムイラで生まれた時，父Benjamin Franklin Hancockは22歳，母Elizabeth Jamesonは22歳であった。1755年10月15日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州グーチランドスト. ジャム'ス パーイッシュでElizabeth Maddoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1775年にはアメリカ合衆国に，1785年にはアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリーに住んでいた。彼は1802年11月10日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州グーチランドで70歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州プアトリックプアトリック スプリングズリバートイ プリミティブ バプティスト チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John D. Hancock(이)가 1732년 1월 1일 미국 버지니아 주 플루반아 팰미라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benjamin Franklin Hancock(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Jameson(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1755년 10월 15일 미국 버지니아 주 구클랜드 스트. 자'스 파리시에서 Elizabeth Maddox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1775년도에 미국에서, 1785년도에 미국 버지니아 주 헨리에서 살았다. 그는 1802년 11월 10일 미국 버지니아 주 구클랜드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 패트릭 패트릭 스프링스 리버티 프림이티브 바프티스트 c후르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John D. Hancock nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1732, em Palmyra, Fluvanna, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Benjamin Franklin Hancock, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Jameson, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Maddox em 15 de outubro de 1755, em St. Jame's Parish, Goochland, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele viveu em Estados Unidos da América em 1775 e em Henry, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América em 1785. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1802, em Goochland, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Liberty Primitive Baptist Church Cemetery, Patrick Springs, Patrick, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John D. Hancock родился 1 января 1732 г. в местности палмира, флуванна, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Benjamin Franklin Hancock было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Jameson, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Maddox 15 октября 1755 г. в местности ст. джеме'с пэриш, гучланд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он жил в местности Соединенные штаты в 1775 году и в местности хенри, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в 1785 году. Он умер 10 ноября 1802 г. в местности гучланд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности либирти примитив баптист чурч кеметири, патрикк спрингс, патрикк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John D. Hancock nació el 1 de enero de 1732, en Palmyra, Fluvanna, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Benjamin Franklin Hancock, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Jameson, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Maddox el 15 de octubre de 1755, en St. Jame's Parish, Goochland, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Vivió en Estados Unidos en 1775 y en Henry, Virginia, Estados Unidos en 1785. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1802, en Goochland, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Liberty Primitive Baptist Church Cemetery, Patrick Springs, Patrick, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
